title.es: Contenedorización del Monorepo de la Empresa

description.en: Dockerize an existing monorepo for development: one UI container running both Next.js apps with hot reload, a FastAPI backend with --reload, and Docker Compose orchestration with service-name networking.
description.es: Dockeriza un monorepo existente para desarrollo: un contenedor de interfaces con ambas apps Next.js y recarga en caliente, backend FastAPI con --reload y orquestación con Docker Compose usando nombres de servicio.

sharing.en: I just completed Company Monorepo Containerization with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-container-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #architecture #backenddesign #docker
